title: Trump announces Iran talks in Doha as Hormuz tensions soar
gist: Trump announced Iran talks in Doha as Strait of Hormuz tensions soared, following the Lebanese parliament speaker's criticism of the recent US-brokered deal with Israel.

insights.claim: Trump announced Iran talks in Doha as tensions over the Strait of Hormuz soared.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: Diplomatic channel opening amid escalation is a swing factor for energy and risk assets.
insights.locator: Trump announces Iran talks in Doha

insights.claim: Lebanon's parliament speaker slammed the recent US-brokered deal between Israel and Lebanon.
insights.speaker: Al-Monitor
insights.so_what: Domestic Lebanese pushback signals fragility in the US-brokered arrangement.
insights.locator: The announcement follows the Lebanese parliament speaker
